subject: Re: Annual Report Draft - Final Pieces
snippet: Thursday still works for the deadline. I will need the draft by end of day...
body:
Brandon,

Thursday still works for the deadline. I will need the draft by end of day so the board can review over the weekend.

One more thing - the board approved adding a "Digital Literacy for Seniors pilot" line item to the report. It launched in September so we do not have big numbers yet but they want it in the highlights section. Just a brief mention with the note that metrics will be reported in the Q1 FY2027 update.

Let me know if you need anything else from me before then.

Dina

subject: Annual Report Draft - Final Pieces
snippet: Starting to pull together materials for the FY2026 annual report. Preliminary budget shows design services at around $5,800.00...
body:
Hi Brandon,

Starting to pull together materials for the FY2026 annual report. Preliminary budget shows your design services at around $5,800.00 invoiced so far, but I know there might be more coming. Just wanted to give you a heads up on the timeline - we are targeting early October for the draft.

I will get you the program stats and board figures as soon as they are finalized.

Thanks,
Dina

Hi Brandon,

I know you do design work for Mountain Heritage Arts. Can you share what you're charging the nonprofit? I want to make sure I'm getting a fair rate for my brochure projects. Just want to compare rates before we start the Q4 flyer template project.

Thanks,
Patrick
